name: bluealpha-marketing-plugin
description: Paid media strategy, analysis, and measurement powered by BlueAlpha's unified MCP (Google Ads + Meridian MMM). 10 skills covering competitive conquest, SEO-paid bridging, creative refresh, audience intelligence, incrementality testing, geo expansion, and full-account optimization — all analysis-only with execution routed through the BlueAlpha pipeline. Requires the bluealpha-mcp connector.
